rootCause.description: One sentence: what error occurred, in which service, and the HTTP status code.

failingService.description: Name of the service where the error originated (e.g. car-booking, flight-booking, hotel-booking, trip-booking).

errorMessage.description: The exact error message from the originating failure span or log.

httpStatusCode.description: HTTP status code returned by the failing service. 0 if not an HTTP error.

service.description: Service or operation name from the span.

parentSpanId.description: Parent span ID. Empty string for root span.

status.description: Whether this span succeeded or failed.

durationMs.description: Span duration in milliseconds (converted from durationNano).

isErrorOrigin.description: True only for the single span where the error originated, not for spans that merely propagated it.

callFlow.description: Ordered list of spans forming the call flow, with hierarchy encoded via parentSpanId.

service.description: Service name that emitted the error.

message.description: Exact error message quoted from logs, exception messages, or JSON error payloads.

serviceErrors.description: All error messages extracted from service logs and error events.
